name: AdOff 50 - Visual Asset Pipeline
description: Automatic visual asset generation (image/video) for approved social media drafts. Bridges gemini_copy_drafts → media_queue → posts_queue.

parameters.query: SELECT id, body, platform, lang, concept, asset_type FROM adoff_autopilot.gemini_copy_drafts WHERE status='approved' AND asset_type='caption_social' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM adoff_autopilot.media_queue m WHERE m.draft_id=adoff_autopilot.gemini_copy_drafts.id) LIMIT 10;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lang: $json.lang, concept: $json.concept, force: false, no_logo_variant: true }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ prompt: `AdOff brand-safe lifestyle image, concept: ${$json.concept}, no brand names, no UI mockup, photographic style, vibrant, language: ${$json.lang}`, negative_prompt: 'text, logo, watermark, artificial, low quality', width: 1080, height: 1350, steps: 4, cfg_scale: 1.0, requested_by: 'w50-visual-pipeline', platform: 'instagram' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ prompt: `AdOff brand-safe promotional image, concept: ${$json.concept}, no brand names, no UI mockup, photographic style, vibrant, language: ${$json.lang}`, negative_prompt: 'text, logo, watermark, artificial, low quality', width: 1200, height: 630, steps: 4, cfg_scale: 1.0, requested_by: 'w50-visual-pipeline', platform: 'facebook' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ prompt: `AdOff brand-safe image for Twitter/X, concept: ${$json.concept}, no brand names, no UI mockup, photographic style, language: ${$json.lang}`, negative_prompt: 'text, logo, watermark, artificial, low quality', width: 1200, height: 675, steps: 4, cfg_scale: 1.0, requested_by: 'w50-visual-pipeline', platform: 'twitter' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ prompt: `AdOff professional corporate image for LinkedIn, concept: ${$json.concept}, no brand names, no UI mockup, professional style, clean design, language: ${$json.lang}`, negative_prompt: 'text, logo, watermark, casual, low quality', width: 1200, height: 627, steps: 4, cfg_scale: 1.0, requested_by: 'w50-visual-pipeline', platform: 'linkedin' }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO adoff_autopilot.media_queue (draft_id, platform, media_type, media_path, job_id, prompt_used, dimensions, status, error, retry_count, created_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9, 0, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (draft_id, platform) DO UPDATE SET status=EXCLUDED.status, media_path=COALESCE(EXCLUDED.media_path, media_queue.media_path), job_id=COALESCE(EXCLUDED.job_id, media_queue.job_id), updated_at=NOW() RETURNING id, draft_id, status;
UPDATE adoff_autopilot.posts_queue SET media_path=$1, updated_at=NOW() WHERE source_draft_id=$2 AND media_path IS NULL;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, media_id: $json.id, draft_id: $json.draft_id, status: $json.status, message: 'Visual asset queued for generation' } }}
